[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011110100 5
1 001001100 3
2 010110010 4
3 000111001 4
4 101111111 8
5 111111011 8
6 111110111 8
7 111110110 7

56 65 010111011 6
67 76 101111111 8 match 4
70 07 101111111 8 match 4

13 31 111110101 7

61 16 111111001 7
72 27 111110110 7 match 7
